name: Dr. Patricia Wells
employment_history:
McKinsey & Company — Senior Manager (2021-03 → current)
Lead consulting engagements with revenue responsibility of EUR 4-6M per project. Manage teams of 8-12 consultants across two parallel engagements. Mentor for three associates and one engagement manager. Co-lead the German Healthcare Practice for the Munich office.

McKinsey & Company — Associate (2018-09 → 2021-02)
Consultant on strategy and M&A engagements primarily in financial services and pharmaceuticals.

McKinsey & Company — Senior Associate (2016-09 → 2018-08)
Consultant on engagements primarily in financial services and private equity.

Boston Consulting Group — Associate (2014-08 → 2016-08)
Strategy and operations engagements primarily in consumer goods and retail.

London School of Economics — Research Assistant (2010-09 → 2014-06)
PhD research on banking regulation and systemic risk. Co-authored three peer-reviewed publications.
education:
London School of Economics — PhD in Economics (2010 → 2014)
London School of Economics — Master of Science in Economics (2009 → 2010)
University of Cambridge — Bachelor of Arts in Economics (2006 → 2009)
industries: Financial Services, Healthcare, Consumer Goods, Pharmaceuticals, Banking, Insurance, Asset Management, Retail
functional_expertise: Strategy, Mergers and Acquisitions, Digital Transformation, Post-Merger Integration
methods: Lean Six Sigma, Design Thinking, Agile, OKR, Theory of Constraints, Total Quality Management
tools: Microsoft Excel, Microsoft PowerPoint, think-cell, Tableau, Alteryx, Power BI, SQL, Python, R, SAP, Salesforce
certifications: Lean Six Sigma Black Belt (2017), Scrum Master PSM II (2020), CFA Level III (2019)
